name: World Models as Adversaries: Multi-Agent Self-Play Fine-Tuning for Robust Motion Planning
summary: arXiv:2607.10630v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Robust motion planning in dense traffic requires autonomous vehicles to interact in rare and safety-critical scenarios that are underrepresented in...
description: arXiv:2607.10630v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Robust motion planning in dense traffic requires autonomous vehicles to interact in rare and safety-critical scenarios that are underrepresented in naturalistic driving data. Although adversarial training offers a feasible solution, existing methods often rely on external scenario generators, heuristic perturbations, or simulator-heavy rollouts,...
author: Tong Nie, Yuewen Mei, Junlin He, Yihong Tang, Jian Sun, Wei Ma
